zh.lifeSummary: 當Annabella Graham of Kincardine於大約1300年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努時，她的父親David de Graham Laird of Dundaff27歲，母親Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire30歲。她於1318年與Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox在英國蘇格蘭培爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1342年4月13日在英國蘇格蘭羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪希爾 本 費亞享年43歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Annabella Graham of Kincardine于大约1300年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾登努时，她的父亲David de Graham Laird of Dundaff27岁，母亲Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire30岁。她于1318年与Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox在英国苏格兰培爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1342年4月13日在英国苏格兰羅斯 安德 可洛馬迪希爾 本 費亞享年43岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Annabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabell
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

variants.name: Annabelle
meanings: Sometimes taken as an elaboration of   Anna  , but more probably a dissimilated form of   Amabel .  It has been common in Scotland since the 12th century and was still in use in England in the 1600s. Its recent revival in popularity in England and elsewhere dates from the 1940s.

en.lifeSummary: When Annabella Graham of Kincardine was born about 1300, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, was 27 and her mother, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, was 30. She married Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox in 1318, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 13 April 1342, in Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 43, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Annabella Graham of Kincardine est née environ 1300, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox en 1318, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 avril 1342, à Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Annabella Graham of Kincardine um 1300 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater David de Graham Laird of Dundaff 27 und ihre Mutter Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire 30. Sie hat 1318 in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. April 1342 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Graham of Kincardine è nata il circa 1300 nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox nel 1318, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 aprile 1342, nel Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Annabella Graham of Kincardineが約1300年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで生まれた時，父David de Graham Laird of Dundaffは27歳，母Isabella Erskine- of Perthshireは30歳であった。1318年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアでMalcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennoxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1342年4月13日にイギリススコットランドロス アンド クロマルトイヒル オフ フエアルンで43歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 힐 프 피른
ko.lifeSummary: Annabella Graham of Kincardine(이)가 대략 1300년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 David de Graham Laird of Dundaff(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1342년 4월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 힐 프 피른에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Annabella Graham of Kincardine nasceu aproximadamente 1300, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox em 1318, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de abril de 1342, em Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 43 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Scotla: хилл оф фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Annabella Graham of Kincardine родилась около 1300 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени David de Graham Laird of Dundaff было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox в 1318 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 апреля 1342 г. в местности хилл оф фирн, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 43 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Annabella Graham of Kincardine nació aproximadamente 1300, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, David de Graham Laird of Dundaff, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Isabella Erskine- of Perthshire, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Malcolm Drummond 10th Thane of Lennox en 1318, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de abril de 1342, en Hill of Fearn, Ross and Cromarty, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
